name: Agent Message Bus
description: File-based message bus enabling multiple agent tasks to communicate with each other. Supports broadcast, directed mentions, topic filtering, and TTL-based expiry.

Managers/MessageBusManager.cs.content:
class BusMessage
  From: string
  FromSummary: string
  Type: string
  Topic: string
  Body: string
  Mentions: List<string>
  Timestamp: DateTime
  SourceFile: string
  ExpiresAt: DateTime
  IsExpired() -> bool
class BusParticipant
  TaskId: string
  Summary: string
class BusContext
  BusDir: string
  InboxDir: string
  Watcher: FileSystemWatcher?
  PollTimer: DispatcherTimer?
  ParticipantTaskIds: HashSet<string>

patterns: File-system watcher per bus inbox directory
TTL expiry enforced on message read
